backlog.title: First Authentik login creates user + org in DB
backlog.description: When a new user signs in via Authentik for the first time, a user row and organization row should be created and linked. Needs verification.

backlog.title: Dashboard + billing work under Authentik session
backlog.description: Verify org context, billing status, and Stripe checkout all function when auth_provider=authentik.

backlog.title: Restrict auth provider switcher to admin role
backlog.description: Currently any signed-in user can switch providers. Should be restricted to org admin only.

backlog.title: Link user.authentikId after first Authentik login
backlog.description: Populate the nullable authentikId column on the user row after first Authentik OAuth login to enable account linking.

in_progress.title: [VERIFY] Authentik sign-in flow end-to-end
in_progress.description: After fix in 670473e (next-auth v5 signIn() URL), verify full Clerk→Authentik switch: sign out, redirect to auth.joefuentes.me, sign in, land on /dashboard.

in_review.title: Smoke test polls correct SHA (parent of CI bump)
in_review.description: Fixed in 1542ceb. Smoke test now detects ci: prefix commits and polls the parent code commit SHA instead.

in_review.title: Smoke test concurrency — cancel stale runs
in_review.description: Fixed in 370c0c0. concurrency group added, run_id monotonic guard prevents stale overwrites.

done.title: Auth provider instant switching via DB (no redeploy)
done.description: getActiveProvider() reads app_config table at runtime. setActiveProvider() writes to DB and busts cache. Middleware checks both Clerk and next-auth cookies.
